subject: refactor(theme): remove old theme system, complete DaisyUI migration
body:
Delete the entire old theme infrastructure:
- useAppTheme.ts (AppThemeProvider, useAppTheme, useThemeMode, useThemedStyles)
- constants/Colors.ts (LightTheme, DarkTheme, AppColors brand/price)
- components/Themed.tsx (legacy themed Text/View wrappers)
- components/useColorScheme.ts/.web.ts (system color scheme hooks)

Rewrite app/_layout.tsx: remove AppThemeProvider wrapper, build React
Navigation theme directly from useTheme().colors hex values.

Update BurgerMenu: remove useThemeMode import, use only useTheme() for
isDark state and toggleMode function.

Update docs: HISTORY.md (migration changelog), SESSION_NOTES.md (current
state), TODO.md (add RNR adoption and theme expansion items).

Tags: theme, daisyui, uniwind, cleanup, refactor
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-theme-migration
Semver: minor
